goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'friday'.
The train should 'leave after 09:45' and should depart from 'ely'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
